page_metadata.biotools__summary: Collection of gene and protein names, organized by species that can be used to search for a given gene/protein name, retrieve all synonyms for this entity, and query Medline with a set of user-selected terms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Collection of gene and protein names, organized by species that can be used to search for a given gene/protein name, retrieve all synonyms for this entity, and query Medline with a set of user-selected terms.
